1）下行直传，完保不加密，piggyback NAS消息是smc
Hex Byte Stream：
28824FC07DF303C3E00FC00BA220205E1E06C02040

2）下行直传，完保不加密，piggyback NAS消息是PDU session establishment accept
Hex Byte Stream：288E0FC02DC95F23004FC00D00200C25C02038422001202000C62620203FE040C0A00080A0008520A038150040644020300EA000EC00008A202020AF200120440840E02C002020AF600370000180981500402000221FA0060000000000000000000000000024A121096CAF2E6D2CED0E824020

3）SIB1
Hex Byte Stream：




使用上面的Hex Byte Stream，选择消息类型为BCCH—DL-SCH message，点击decode按钮，显示正常的decoded tree页面，不修改任何IE值，直接点击encode按钮，显示异常
Encode failed: PLMN-IdentityInfo.trackingAreaCode: invalid named bits, [2359635, 24]
我查了PLMN-IdentityInfo.trackingAreaCode的类型是TrackingAreaCode ::= BIT STRING (SIZE (24)) ，2359635对应的值0x240153
